case_title: NICOLE TATROW VS. ECHELON ONE, LLC, AN OHIO LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TATROW, NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT ECHELON ONE, LLC, AN OHIO LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TATROW, NICOLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ECHELON ONE, LLC, AN OHIO LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $48,116.75 PRINCIPAL, $276.90 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $48,803.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
